tests.name: padding-and-mixed-sizes
tests.expected_stdout:
alloc size=1 offset=0 end=1
alloc size=8 offset=8 end=16
alloc size=9 offset=16 end=25
used=25 capacity=64

tests.name: already-aligned
tests.expected_stdout:
alloc size=8 offset=0 end=8
alloc size=8 offset=8 end=16
used=16 capacity=64

tests.name: exact-capacity
tests.expected_stdout:
alloc size=64 offset=0 end=64
used=64 capacity=64

tests.name: out-of-memory-after-prefix
tests.expected_stdout:
alloc size=16 offset=0 end=16
alloc size=41 offset=16 end=57
oom size=8 used=57 capacity=64

tests.name: reject-zero
tests.expected_stdout: error: sizes must be positive decimal integers

tests.name: padding-then-exact-capacity
tests.expected_stdout:
alloc size=1 offset=0 end=1
alloc size=56 offset=8 end=64
used=64 capacity=64

tests.name: alignment-padding-causes-out-of-memory
tests.expected_stdout:
alloc size=57 offset=0 end=57
oom size=1 used=57 capacity=64

tests.name: reject-size-above-arena-capacity
tests.expected_stdout: error: sizes must be positive decimal integers
